name: Breach Remedies
text: In the event of a breach of this Agreement, the non-breaching Party shall be entitled to seek all available legal and equitable remedies, including specific performance, injunctive relief, and damages.
invalid_if: If the contract contains an exclusive remedies clause.
If specific performance or injunctive relief is explicitly waived for certain breaches.
If the contract provides for liquidated damages as the sole remedy for breach.
title: Breach Remedies
